response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but lacks the core C++ depth, industrial automation background, and IEC 62443/SDL security expertise central to this role. The only direct C++ exposure is a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, which is insufficient for a Senior Manager C++ Developer position requiring 8-12 years building high-performance on-prem industrial systems with MQTT, message brokers, and OT protocols.
strengths: 8+ years of senior-level software engineering with architecture and mentoring experience
Strong testing/TDD discipline and agile collaboration track record
Exposure to distributed, high-throughput systems (Sociomantic micro-services, event-driven Geo platform)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only a 6-month NI role in 2014-2015
No demonstrated industrial automation, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle background
Missing MQTT, message-broker, and OT-protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) experience

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 SDL exposure
Strong general senior engineering and architecture experience
